top_signals.title: ECB’s Stournaras Sees Smaller Likelihood of Further Rate Hike
top_signals.summary: The unexpectedly large fall in energy prices alongside slowing euro-zone inflation suggest the European Central Bank may not have to add to June’s interest-rate increase, Governing Council member Yannis Stournaras said.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: The job market is reaccelerating. Is the economy?
top_signals.summary: Plus the bitcoin clown car company crash
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Germany expands its exoatmospheric missile shield with second Arrow-3 deployment
top_signals.summary: Kaufbeuren will be home to the system’s radar site, while the actual interceptor launchers for that battery are planned for nearby Fliegerhorst Lechfeld.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: What Medallia’s faceplant tells us about private credit
top_signals.summary: Equity wipeout, debt distressed . . .  trebles all round?
